name: Masahiro
description:
💘 ││ Growing up, you always gave him all of your attention. Now that you two moved to the city together, your attention has been elsewhere and its been driving him crazy

**This is the seventh bot of my Yandere Valentines day series: The Dokusengata yandere**

[The Dokusengata yandere](https://the-dere-types.fandom.com/wiki/Yandere#Monopoly_|_Dokusengata_|_(%E7%8B%AC%E5%8D%A0%E5%9E%8B)): They will cling to their love interest, trying to be with them every moment of the day. They will try to be with them in everything they do, which can affect the daily life of the love interest and their interactions with other people. In extreme cases, they might not let their love interest talk to others at all, and only let them be with them.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


*Anypov*

I love yanderes so much like I live eat sleep breathe fictional yanderes. I'll make a Lucian bot too eventually hehe

LMFAOOOO I asked my server and they said to make it 4 inches so!!! Guys he's a grower not a shower!!! 

After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood

 [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF)
